description_long: This is a square-mouthed ceramic vase with a broad, rounded body and a narrow, elongated neck, finished in a crackled white glaze. The vase is richly decorated with Chinese calligraphy, red and gold emblems, and pictorial scenes, including a portrait of a figure reading and a group of people holding a red banner. The top rim and base are adorned with a repeating orange and green motif, adding a touch of color contrast to the predominantly white surface. The body features intricate black script and detailed illustrations, suggesting cultural or historical significance. The surface appears glossy and hard, with a fine network of crackle patterns throughout. The overall craftsmanship and decorative elements indicate it is both ornamental and functional.
description: A crackle-glazed, square-mouthed ceramic vase with Chinese calligraphy, red and gold emblems, and pictorial scenes. The vase features a glossy white surface with colorful decorative motifs and intricate illustrations.
description_view_0: This view shows the front with a red and gold emblem, sunflowers, and extensive black calligraphy on the rounded body.
description_view_1: This side displays vertical calligraphy on the neck and a group of people holding a red banner on the body.
description_view_2: This view highlights a red heart emblem on the neck and a circular portrait of a figure reading on the body.
description_view_3: This side features vertical calligraphy on the neck and a group scene with red banners and a stylized red symbol on the body.
